scripts.build: node -e "console.log('private2-static is static; no build step needed.')"
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .env.example README.md Dockerfile Caddyfile public tests
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .env.example README.md Dockerfile Caddyfile public tests
